[Affordability Confirmation] To Kayla ******,

Thank you for your loan application. In line with applicable regulations we have asked you a number of questions regarding your income and normal expenditure, in order to assess your ability to afford this loan.

The Information you gave us in response to these questions has allowed us to determine that you can afford this loan. Please review the details below and ensure that you are comfortable that you have been honest and complete in your answers to our questions, and that the income and expenditure figures give a clear picture of your financial position and ability to meet repayments. If you feel that the details you have provided are incomplete PLEASE CONTACT US IMMEDIATELY, before the loan is paid out. If you have received money from us already, please return this immediately so that the loan to you can be cancelled. Receiving money based on false representations made during an application can leave you exposed to litigation for misrepresentation and fraud, which is a felony under US Law.

IF THE INFORMATION BELOW IS CORRECT, YOU DO NOT NEED TO REPLY TO THIS EMAIL.

Information provided to Transform Credit by you:

IP: 174.238.52.63

Bills: $0
Other Expenses: $350
Your Credit Commitments: $0
Transform Credit Repayment: $180.650000
To be safe: $50
Total available after expenditure and this loan repayment: $219.350000


Yours sincerely
Transform credit Applications Dept

interactions.body: (Borrower GT Rule 1 SMS) Hi Darniecca, all of our customers must have a cosigner. It's a great sign someone trusts you, so we should too! They can be ANYONE who has a 700+ credit and good history of paying their bills. Homeowners with slightly lower scores will also have a good chance of approval. Remember, if you pay on time, your cosigner will NEVER have to pay! Find tips here: https://togetherloans.com/cosigner-loans. When you do find someone, give them this link https://tcrdt.com/s/J69JOAN9 - we'd love to add you to the 40,000 customers we have already helped like you. If you still can't find a cosigner, please reply CANCEL so I can reserve the loan for someone else. Ben, Together Loans

interactions.body:
Hi Jan,

Thank you for your contact.

Transform Credit Inc. is registered with the Nationwide Multistate Licensing System (NMLS), with license number 1905055, but as an online lender, all our processes are made electronically. 

A loan application is created when a consumer applies and electronically signs with their details through our website. We do various checks, before agreeing to any loan, and any loan is paid just after verifying the identity of the consumers and speaking to them (both borrower and cosigner) over the phone or video.

Our platform is secure and we can help you with any queries, answering as soon as possible. Our team is here to help you.

Please, check here for more questions: transformcredit.com/faq

To continue with your application, you can use this link: https://tcrdt.com/s/EDIO0YO2
 
Thanks, Transform Credit

[A cosigner is your key to $3000] Thank you for your offer. Well known loan company lend me $2590 without
co-signer. I’m impress they have trust me. I will recommend them to all I
know who wants to borrow money. Thanks

[Need help finding a cosigner?] Thank you for your offer. A good loan company lend $2500 without co-signer.
That what I call trusting their clients. Gave them everything they need
verify them and my loan was approve got my money the same day. I will
highly recommend this company to all people I know. Thanks

(Borrower GT Rule 1 Email) [RE:Need help finding a cosigner?] Hi Lerma, 

Thanks for reaching out, we understand that it can seem difficult to find a cosigner at first. Don't worry though, we help people like you every day!

We're a cosigner lender, all of our customers must have a cosigner for us to lend to them. A cosigner is a great sign that someone trusts you, and that we should too regardless of your credit history! If your cosigner trusts you, then we will.

A cosigner can be ANYONE you know (family, friend, neighbor or even a colleague) who is a US resident, has a 700+ credit score and good history of paying their bills on time - someone who owns their home or pays a mortgage is much more likely to be accepted. Remember, as long as you pay on time, your cosigner will NEVER have to make a payment! You might find some useful tips on how to approach finding or speaking to a potential cosigner here: https://transformcredit.com/cosigner-loans

When you have found someone, give them this link https://tcrdt.com/s/N1FPPZG0 - we'd love for your loan to add to the $100 million we've already paid out to people just like you. If you still find that you're not able to find a cosigner, please respond to this email with CANCEL so I can reserve the loan for someone else.

Thanks, 
Jade@Transform Credit

[Affordability Confirmation] To Hector ******,

Thank you for your loan application. In line with applicable regulations we have asked you a number of questions regarding your income and normal expenditure, in order to assess your ability to afford this loan.

The Information you gave us in response to these questions has allowed us to determine that you can afford this loan. Please review the details below and ensure that you are comfortable that you have been honest and complete in your answers to our questions, and that the income and expenditure figures give a clear picture of your financial position and ability to meet repayments. If you feel that the details you have provided are incomplete PLEASE CONTACT US IMMEDIATELY, before the loan is paid out. If you have received money from us already, please return this immediately so that the loan to you can be cancelled. Receiving money based on false representations made during an application can leave you exposed to litigation for misrepresentation and fraud, which is a felony under US Law.

IF THE INFORMATION BELOW IS CORRECT, YOU DO NOT NEED TO REPLY TO THIS EMAIL.

Information provided to Transform Credit by you:

interactions.body:
[Adriana has taken the first step in helping you!] El problema es que no tengo aval Adriana no pudo seguir el proceso

El lun, 8 de dic de 2025, 8:12 a.m., hello@transformcredit.com <
hello@transformcredit.com> escribió:

(No English Speaker BRW SMS) [RE:Adriana has taken the first step in helping you!] Hi, thank you for your contact.

At this time, our infrastructure only supports being able to lend to those that can understand English - our contracts, website, communications, and staff are not set up to support other languages, although this is something we are excited to develop in the future so that we can help more people that do not speak English. 

Please, answer this message in English, so we can help you.

Thanks, TransformCredit

En este momento, nuestra infraestructura solo permite prestar a aquellos que pueden entender inglés: nuestros contratos, sitio web, comunicaciones y personal no están configurados para admitir otros idiomas, aunque esto es algo que nos entusiasma desarrollar en el futuro, por lo que que podamos ayudar a más personas que no hablan inglés. Por favor, responde este mensaje en Inglés, para que podamos ayudarte. Gracias, TransformCredit

[Adriana has taken the first step in helping you!] Okay, the problem is that I don't have a guarantor to apply for the loan.


El lun, 8 de dic de 2025, 8:41 a.m., hello@transformcredit.com <
hello@transformcredit.com> escribió:

(Borrower GT Rule 1 Email) [RE:Adriana has taken the first step in helping you!] Hi Hector, 

Thanks for reaching out, we understand that it can seem difficult to find a cosigner at first. Don't worry though, we help people like you every day!

We're a cosigner lender, all of our customers must have a cosigner for us to lend to them. A cosigner is a great sign that someone trusts you, and that we should too regardless of your credit history! If your cosigner trusts you, then we will.

A cosigner can be ANYONE you know (family, friend, neighbor or even a colleague) who is a US resident, has a 700+ credit score and good history of paying their bills on time - someone who owns their home or pays a mortgage is much more likely to be accepted. Remember, as long as you pay on time, your cosigner will NEVER have to make a payment! You might find some useful tips on how to approach finding or speaking to a potential cosigner here: https://transformcredit.com/cosigner-loans

When you have found someone, give them this link https://tcrdt.com/s/XACQX2LF - we'd love for your loan to add to the $100 million we've already paid out to people just like you. If you still find that you're not able to find a cosigner, please respond to this email with CANCEL so I can reserve the loan for someone else.

Thanks, 
Jade@Transform Credit

Thank you for your contact. 

Upon review, I could confirm we received your cosigner application, but Adriana did not complete it yet. We sent an email and SMS with a link so they can continue, you can also remind Adriana to check our messages. I hope this helps. 

Thanks, Together Loans

Hi Adriana, you must upload your ID via the link sent to continue. We do this to prevent identity fraud from being committed against you. You must upload your physical ID, that belongs to you and is in date. Please, add your ID here: https://tcrdt.com/s/BZRS8CE6 or let us know if you need more help. Thanks, Together Loans

[Your Together Loans Loan Application : *****************32426] Hi Adriana, 

To continue with the application, you will need to upload your ID using the secure link below. This step is required to prevent identity fraud and to confirm that the ID belongs to you. Please upload your physical, in date ID here: https://tcrdt.com/s/BZRS8CE6 • Make sure you are in a well lit area and have a stable internet connection • Use your smartphone camera to scan your ID clearly, including the front and back • You will then be asked to take a quick selfie so Veriff can match your face to your ID • Follow the on screen instructions until you receive confirmation that your ID was submitted successfully If you experience any issues, you can try using a different device or browser. You may also use a trusted friend’s or family member’s phone if needed. If you are having trouble allowing camera or microphone permissions, please follow the instructions for your device below: For iPhone: https://tglns.com/s/AUA3D7JE For Android: https://tglns.com/s/D6B2SXSF If you need any help, just let us know. 

Thanks, Together Loans

interactions.body: [Missing Subject] Quiero cancelar el pago de $5 dólares

(Borrower CreditBuilder - CANCEL Email) [RE:Missing Subject] Hi Paula,
 
Thanks for getting in touch.
 
I can see that on 12/14/2024 you signed up for a CreditBuilder account AND applied for a $3000 loan. I can confirm that I have canceled your Transform CreditBuilder, you will not be charged again.

The transform credit builder helps build your credit, even if you do not borrow from us. 

When you sign up for CreditBuilder, you take the first step in building your score over 1-2 years. Each month you pay $5, which we report to the Credit Bureaus as interest against a loan that is held on your behalf. These successful payments build up your credit history, helping to improve your score. Once the loan term is completed, or if you decide to cancel/stop paying, CreditBuilder is simply marked as paid in full. This prevents any missed payments from undoing the positive impact that your on-time payments have on your credit score.

CreditBuilder is a fantastic stepping stone towards seeing the benefits of an improving credit score, without the responsibility of taking on a big financial commitment. When you do find yourself ready, with the help of a co-signer, TransformCredit can help you access funds too! At which point, any CreditBuilder loan you have will be paid in full on your behalf.

You can find out more about the Transform CreditBuilder here - transformcredit.com/transform-credit-builder/

We still have your loan application approved for you. All you need is a cosigner, a friend or a family member who has a 750+ credit score and agrees to make the payment if you can't. 

If you need help, please let me know
 
Have a great day, 
James, TransformCredit

[A cosigner is your key to $8000] Hello,

I am still working on getting a co-signer, it has not been easy to get
someone that meets your requirements.  I have a couple folks that I am
waiting to hear back from.

(I need more time email) [RE:A cosigner is your key to $8000] Hi Debra

Take as long as you need, we will keep your application open for you. 

Remember, a suitable cosigner is someone who has a credit score of more than 750 and a good history of paying their bills on time (homeowners are more likely to be accepted). Most of our customers ask a close friend or family member to be their cosigner because they know and trust you the most.

When you find someone to be your cosigner, just give them this link so they can apply online in 2 minutes: https://tcrdt.com/s/BPRR6AUI . In the meantime, it might help you to check out this page: https://transformcredit.com/cosigner-loans and if you have any more questions, please let us know.

James, TransformCredit

(Progress Update - LEAD/NoGT BRW Email) [RE:A cosigner is your key to $8000] Hi Debra,

We've got your $8000 reserved, you and your cosigner just need to finish your application by submitting your information.

Use this link to pick up where you left off: https://tcrdt.com/s/JXXM467T

We will always do everything we can to make sure your loan is paid out as quickly as possible. We aim to pay out every loan within 24 hours of the cosigner being accepted (remember - your cosigner can be ANYONE you know who is a US resident, has a 750+ credit score and good history of paying their bills on time). 

If you and your cosigner complete the application online and all checks are completed without issue, we could get the money to you sooner than 24 hours. If we find that we need more information when we review your application, we'll be in contact - so make sure you're available to speak to us & follow any instructions that we send you as soon as possible.

In the meantime, you'll find helpful answers to lots of questions in our website FAQs: https://transformcredit.com/faq

Jade,
Transform Credit

interactions.body:
[Your TransformCredit Loan Application : *****************62216] Hi Stanley,

Thank you for contacting Transform Credit, your message is really important to us.

I can see that your application is active and you still have some tasks to finish before the loan is paid. Your current application contemplates a loan of $3000, over 36 months, paying back $137.39 monthly, but you can change these terms anytime before the loan is paid.

Transform Credit is a cosigner-based lender.  This means all of our customers must have a cosigner for us to lend to them, regardless of the loan that you're applying for and your credit score. Normally, a cosigner is a friend or a family member who knows you (the borrower) and trusts that it is a good idea for you to borrow money. A suitable cosigner is someone who has a credit score of more than 700 and a strong history of paying their bills on time. Homeowners are more likely to be accepted even if they have a slightly lower score, as long as they have a history of paying their debts on time.

How does the application journey work? When you apply online, we will send you a unique link for your cosigner to register. As soon as we have everything we need from both of you, we’ll transfer the money. The money is transferred into your cosigner's account. This is to protect them, and us, against identity fraud, as transferring the money into their account ensures that they are fully aware of the loan.

You can check here more information about the application journey and common questions: https://transformcredit.com/faq 

To complete your application journey and check what is the next step, you can use this link: https://tcrdt.com/s/GR8S688M

Any other questions, please let me know.

Have a nice day,
Ceera@TransformCredit

Hi Stanley, to continue your application, you will need a cosigner. Please, use this link to invite them: https://tcrdt.com/s/VRUX1DBR  We aim to pay out every loan within 24 hours of the cosigner being accepted. If you and your cosigner complete the application online and all checks are completed without issue, we could get the money to you sooner! If you need any help, just let me know. Thanks, Ceera@Transform Credit

[Affordability Confirmation] To KRISTOPHER ******,

Thank you for your loan application. In line with applicable regulations we have asked you a number of questions regarding your income and normal expenditure, in order to assess your ability to afford this loan.

The Information you gave us in response to these questions has allowed us to determine that you can afford this loan. Please review the details below and ensure that you are comfortable that you have been honest and complete in your answers to our questions, and that the income and expenditure figures give a clear picture of your financial position and ability to meet repayments. If you feel that the details you have provided are incomplete PLEASE CONTACT US IMMEDIATELY, before the loan is paid out. If you have received money from us already, please return this immediately so that the loan to you can be cancelled. Receiving money based on false representations made during an application can leave you exposed to litigation for misrepresentation and fraud, which is a felony under US Law.

IF THE INFORMATION BELOW IS CORRECT, YOU DO NOT NEED TO REPLY TO THIS EMAIL.

interactions.body: (Borrower GT Rule 1 SMS) Hi KRISTOPHER, all of our customers must have a cosigner. It's a great sign someone trusts you, so we should too! They can be ANYONE who has a 700+ credit and good history of paying their bills. Homeowners with slightly lower scores will also have a good chance of approval. Remember, if you pay on time, your cosigner will NEVER have to pay! Find tips here: https://transformcredit.com/cosigner-loans. When you do find someone, give them this link https://tcrdt.com/s/A4VO4HVC - we'd love to add you to the 40,000 customers we have already helped like you. If you still can't find a cosigner, please reply CANCEL so I can reserve the loan for someone else. Ben, Transform Credit

(Borrower GT Default Email) [RE:Your Transform Credit Loan Application Ref: *****************50135] Hi Eddie, 

Here at Transform Credit, we only offer cosigner loans. Providing a cosigner means we're able to lend to you, even if your credit score is below 500. If your cosigner trusts you then we will too. Your cosigner can be ANYONE you know (family, friend, neighbor, colleague or even your in-laws!) who:

- Is a US resident
- Is over 23 
- Has a credit score of more than 700
- Homeowners are more likely to be accepted even if they have a slightly lower score, as long as they have a history of paying their debts on time.
- Trusts you and will pay if you do not 
- Will give correct contact details and sign the agreement

More information about our cosigner requirements can be found here: https://transformcredit.com/faq. Send this link to your cosigner so they can register online in 2 minutes: https://tcrdt.com/s/9M7N2MFT

If you are not able to find a cosigner, please let me know by responding to this email with "CANCEL". You can reapply at any time by visiting: https://transformcredit.com

Thanks,
Transform Credit

interactions.body: (Borrower GT Rule 1 SMS) Hi Malisha, all of our customers must have a cosigner. It's a great sign someone trusts you, so we should too! They can be ANYONE who has a 700+ credit and good history of paying their bills. Homeowners with slightly lower scores will also have a good chance of approval. Remember, if you pay on time, your cosigner will NEVER have to pay! Find tips here: https://transformcredit.com/cosigner-loans. When you do find someone, give them this link https://tcrdt.com/s/AZUCGGD3 - we'd love to add you to the 40,000 customers we have already helped like you. If you still can't find a cosigner, please reply CANCEL so I can reserve the loan for someone else. Ben, Transform Credit

interactions.body:
[Your TransformCredit Loan Application : *****************60223] Hi Sean,

Thank you for contacting Transform Credit, your message is really important to us.

I can see that your application is active and you still have some tasks to finish before the loan is paid. Your current application contemplates a loan of $3000, over 24 months, paying back $167.73 monthly, but you can change these terms anytime before the loan is paid.

Transform Credit is a cosigner-based lender.  This means all of our customers must have a cosigner for us to lend to them, regardless of the loan that you're applying for and your credit score. Normally, a cosigner is a friend or a family member who knows you (the borrower) and trusts that it is a good idea for you to borrow money. A suitable cosigner is someone who has a credit score of more than 750 and a strong history of paying their bills on time. Homeowners are more likely to be accepted even if they have a slightly lower score, as long as they have a history of paying their debts on time.

How does the application journey work? When you apply online, we will send you a unique link for your cosigner to register. As soon as we have everything we need from both of you, we’ll transfer the money. The money is transferred into your cosigner's account. This is to protect them, and us, against identity fraud, as transferring the money into their account ensures that they are fully aware of the loan.

You can check here more information about the application journey and common questions: https://transformcredit.com/faq 

To complete your application journey and check what is the next step, you can use this link: https://tcrdt.com/s/32ZCC3R6

Any other questions, please let me know.

Have a nice day,
Laura@TransformCredit

This option is available exclusively through our app at https://tglns.com/s/60KPELWZ where you can check your eligibility and manage your account. Best, Tatiana@Together Loans

[Affordability Confirmation] To Julieann ******,

Thank you for your loan application. In line with applicable regulations we have asked you a number of questions regarding your income and normal expenditure, in order to assess your ability to afford this loan.

The Information you gave us in response to these questions has allowed us to determine that you can afford this loan. Please review the details below and ensure that you are comfortable that you have been honest and complete in your answers to our questions, and that the income and expenditure figures give a clear picture of your financial position and ability to meet repayments. If you feel that the details you have provided are incomplete PLEASE CONTACT US IMMEDIATELY, before the loan is paid out. If you have received money from us already, please return this immediately so that the loan to you can be cancelled. Receiving money based on false representations made during an application can leave you exposed to charges of criminal fraud, which is a felony under US Law.

[Your TransformCredit Loan : 010677BABY] Hi Julieann,

We can confirm that our routing number is 022000020 but this is for an ACH transfer and not a wire transfer. If you have any issues with setting up this transaction, please remember that you will need to add us as a new payee if you are actioning this through your phone app and if you are doing this in a bank, it may be best to refer to this transaction as a Bill Payment which it may be recognised as. Please let us know if you require any further assistance. 

Thanks, Daniel@TransformCredit

[Affordability Confirmation] To sabastian ******,

Thank you for your loan application. In line with applicable regulations we have asked you a number of questions regarding your income and normal expenditure, in order to assess your ability to afford this loan.

The information you gave us in response to these questions has allowed us to determine that you can afford this loan. Please review the details below and ensure that you are comfortable that you have been honest and complete in your answers to our questions, and that the income and expenditure figures give a clear picture of your financial position and ability to meet repayments. If you feel that the details you have provided are incomplete PLEASE CONTACT US IMMEDIATELY, before the loan is funded. If you have received money from us already, please return this immediately so that the loan to you can be canceled. Receiving money based on false representations made during an application can leave you exposed to litigation for misrepresentation and fraud, which is a felony under US Law.

[Your Loan Application with Together Loans, Ref: *****************10903] Hello Melissa,

Thank you for starting your loan application with Together Loans. 

Below is a link where you can view/download our free Credit Education Program. You're not required to do anything with this in order to proceed with your application, but we recommend reviewing the content as you may find it helpful.

https://togetherloans.com/credit-education-program?state=fl

Together Loans

[Affordability Confirmation] To Melissa ******,

Thank you for your loan application. In line with applicable regulations we have asked you a number of questions regarding your income and normal expenditure, in order to assess your ability to afford this loan.

The Information you gave us in response to these questions has allowed us to determine that you can afford this loan. Please review the details below and ensure that you are comfortable that you have been honest and complete in your answers to our questions, and that the income and expenditure figures give a clear picture of your financial position and ability to meet repayments. If you feel that the details you have provided are incomplete PLEASE CONTACT US IMMEDIATELY, before the loan is paid out. If you have received money from us already, please return this immediately so that the loan to you can be cancelled. Receiving money based on false representations made during an application can leave you exposed to litigation for misrepresentation and fraud, which is a felony under US Law.

IF THE INFORMATION BELOW IS CORRECT, YOU DO NOT NEED TO REPLY TO THIS EMAIL.

Information provided to Together Loans by you:

Borrower: Melissa ******
IP: 169.254.130.1
DateTime (UTC): 02-06-2026
Stated Monthly Income: Full Time Employed $7500
Rent: $0.00
Bills: $0.00
Other Expenses: $2500.00
Your Credit Commitments: $0.00
Together Loans Repayment: $197.900000
To be safe: $50.00
Total available after expenditure and this loan repayment: $4752.10


Yours sincerely
Together Loans Applications Dept

Hi Kelly,
 
Unfortunately, we cannot proceed with your loan application until you have a cosigner. Our lending decision is based on trust. By providing a cosigner, someone is saying that they trust you to make the loan repayments but agree to make any payments you don't. 

A suitable cosigner is someone who is at least 18 years old and has a very good credit history with no trouble paying bills in the past. Although they don't have to be a homeowner, it may increase the possibility of us accepting them as your cosigner if they do own their own home.

You can invite your cosigner by filling in their information here: 
https://rgct.io/s/2FJAON4C

Thank you,
 
Molly@TransformCredit

default followed  by Bankruptcy.

Kelly ******

[Your TransformCredit Loan : 061172DOLL] Hi Kelly

I am sorry to hear that you and Frank are having health issues. 

However, I want to remind you that we paid this loan on June 17th, 2021. And during our process, we asked you to fill in an income and expenditure form, where you informed us that you were receiving $2200.00 on Benefits. After your expenditure, including this loan's monthly installment, you would be left with $1247.06. We also informed you that receiving money based on false representations made during an application can leave you exposed to criminal fraud charges, which is a felony under US Law.

This is just your third payment, and from the beginning, we have had issues collecting the monthly payment from you. Therefore, we had to collect it from your brother in line with his agreement for the past two payments.

Moreover, you inform us that you are looking to resolve this issue. Can you elaborate on what your resolution will be regarding your current payment, which is due today?

You can forward this email to your attorney as I cannot do that because I do not have his email address and power of attorney.

Best, 
Berginie@TransformCredit

Moreover, the loan funds were disbursed directly to Frank’s bank account to ensure that he had full control over the funds. This step was taken to give Frank the final say in whether he wished to send the funds to Kelly or return them to us if he decided not to proceed with the loan. This process was in place to ensure transparency and allow Frank to make an informed decision at every stage.

We take our responsibility to both borrowers and cosigners seriously, and we are confident that all actions taken during the loan process were transparent and in full compliance with legal requirements. Our goal is always to work fairly with all parties involved, and we are committed to resolving this matter in a manner that reflects this.  

Should you require any additional documentation or clarification regarding the loan or our claim, please feel free to reach out.

interactions.body: [Affordability Confirmation] i dont have a cosigner

(Borrower GT Rule 1 Email) [RE:Affordability Confirmation] Hi Dillard, 

Thanks for reaching out, we understand that it can seem difficult to find a cosigner at first. Don't worry though, we help people like you every day!

We're a cosigner lender, all of our customers must have a cosigner for us to lend to them. A cosigner is a great sign that someone trusts you, and that we should too regardless of your credit history! If your cosigner trusts you, then we will.

A cosigner can be ANYONE you know (family, friend, neighbor or even a colleague) who is a US resident, has a 750+ credit score and good history of paying their bills on time - someone who owns their home or pays a mortgage is much more likely to be accepted. Remember, as long as you pay on time, your cosigner will NEVER have to make a payment! You might find some useful tips on how to approach finding or speaking to a potential cosigner here: https://transformcredit.com/cosigner-loans

When you have found someone, give them this link https://tcrdt.com/s/9IB0KVK9 - we'd love for your loan to add to the $100 million we've already paid out to people just like you. If you still find that you're not able to find a cosigner, please respond to this email with CANCEL so I can reserve the loan for someone else.

Thanks, 
Jade@Transform Credit

(Borrower GT Default Email) [RE:Your TransformCredit Loan Application : *****************70306] Hi Dillard, 

Here at Transform Credit, we only offer cosigner loans. Providing a cosigner means we're able to lend to you, even if your credit score is below 500. If your cosigner trusts you then we will too. Your cosigner can be ANYONE you know (family, friend, neighbor, colleague or even your in-laws!) who:

- Is a US resident
- Is over 23 
- Has a credit score of more than 700
- Homeowners are more likely to be accepted even if they have a slightly lower score, as long as they have a history of paying their debts on time.
- Trusts you and will pay if you do not 
- Will give correct contact details and sign the agreement

More information about our cosigner requirements can be found here: https://transformcredit.com/faq. Send this link to your cosigner so they can register online in 2 minutes: https://tcrdt.com/s/9IB0KVK9

If you are not able to find a cosigner, please let me know by responding to this email with "CANCEL". You can reapply at any time by visiting: https://transformcredit.com

Thanks,
Transform Credit

interactions.body: [Last day for FastTrack] I’m trying to find a co signer, my mom is a home owner but her credit is 620 so that wouldn’t work so still looking

(AI BW GTQs - GT requirements Email) [RE: Last day for FastTrack] Hi Jacob,

A cosigner should be someone who trusts you and agrees to make any repayments you don't. Most of our customers ask a close friend or family member to be their cosigner.

Suitable cosigners should have a good history of paying their bills on time. Homeowners don't usually need to have a score as high as 750 and are more likely to be accepted with a lower score, as long as they pay their bills on time. Generally anyone with over a 700 score has a fair chance of being accepted as long as they have a good payment history.

If you are unsure whether your cosigner will be accepted, we recommend asking them to complete their application online, where they will be informed if they are accepted or not. If you need to provide a new cosigner, please use this link: https://tcrdt.com/s/P1VHX0J9

Thanks,
Transform Credit
[Last day for FastTrack] My grandma might be willing to do it and she has over a 700 credit score and a home owner, once she’s accepted when will I get the money and how will I setup my payments

[We'll keep your $3000 reserved for another 20 days] Hello
My cosigner has taken care of what was needed. Can I get an update on loan?

(Borrower GT Default Email) [RE:We'll keep your $3000 reserved for another 20 days] Hi CHRISTINA, 

Here at Transform Credit, we only offer cosigner loans. Providing a cosigner means we're able to lend to you, even if your credit score is below 500. If your cosigner trusts you then we will too. Your cosigner can be ANYONE you know (family, friend, neighbor, colleague or even your in-laws!) who:

- Is a US resident
- Is over 23 
- Has a credit score of more than 700
- Homeowners are more likely to be accepted even if they have a slightly lower score, as long as they have a history of paying their debts on time.
- Trusts you and will pay if you do not 
- Will give correct contact details and sign the agreement

More information about our cosigner requirements can be found here: https://transformcredit.com/faq. Send this link to your cosigner so they can register online in 2 minutes: https://tcrdt.com/s/64094Z7L

If you are not able to find a cosigner, please let me know by responding to this email with "CANCEL". You can reapply at any time by visiting: https://transformcredit.com

Thanks,
Transform Credit

Please review the details below and ensure that you are comfortable that you have been honest and complete in your answers to our questions, and that the income and expenditure figures give a clear picture of your financial position and ability to meet repayments. If you have received money from us already, please return this immediately so that the loan to you can be cancelled. interactions.body: Hi Steve. Take as long as you need, I will keep your application open for you, and when you are ready to continue, you can use this link: https://tglns.com/s/BVG4OSGP If you still don't have a cosigner, remember that a suitable cosigner is someone who has a credit score of more than 700 and a good history of paying their bills on time - homeowners are more likely to be accepted even if they have a slightly lower score, as long as they have a history of paying their debts on time. Most of our customers ask a close friend or family member to be their cosigner because they know and trust you the most. If you feel that the details you have provided are incomplete PLEASE CONTACT US IMMEDIATELY, before the loan is funded. If you have received money from us already, please return this immediately so that the loan to you can be canceled. El El dom, nov 30, 2025 a la(s) 1:55 p.m., hello@transformcredit.com <
hello@transformcredit.com> escribió:

(Appeals Auto Response BRW Email) [RE:Vi-deudor] Hi Guetsey, 

Thanks for contacting Appeals. 

We understand that it can be disheartening when you're struggling to find a suitable cosigner, don't worry though - the most important thing is we've already accepted your application and want to help you.

There are a few reasons we could find someone to be unsuitable - the most common being a less than perfect credit history. It will be up to your cosigner to make any loan payments that you do not, looking at their Experian credit history allows us to check that they can manage this in addition to their existing commitments. If a potential cosigner has missed or late payments, we can't be certain they'd be able to afford the loan payments while maintaining their other accounts. Alternatively, If your potential cosigner's credit file is locked, we won't have been able to confirm either way (they can apply as soon as their credit file is unlocked: https://tcrdt.com/s/MSD8YM4S). 

When you're considering who to ask, remember your cosigner must have a 750+ credit score and good history of paying their bills on time (homeowners and mortgage payers are more likely to be accepted). It's important to remember that your cosigner can only be on one TransformCredit loan at a time too.

If you've provided someone who is unsure why they weren't accepted, we recommend they check their Experian credit report/score for free at: https://www.experian.com/.

In the meantime, the $3000 will still be reserved for you. We'd love for your loan to add to the $100 million we've already paid out to people just like you. Give this link to your cosigner to register online: https://tcrdt.com/s/MSD8YM4S and feel free to check out our FAQs for further help: https://transformcredit.com/faq.

Jade@TransformCredit 

P.S. I am ready to pay $3000 out within 24 hours of your cosigner being approved, but if you don't plan to provide a new cosigner please let me know by replying CANCEL so I can reserve it for someone else

interactions.body:
[Your Together Loans Loan Application : *****************91434] REF: Your Experian Dispute Answer-  CB02895281
Hi Guetsey,
 
We received a dispute from Experian and upon review, we could see here that you applied for a loan via the Together Loans website and during the application process, signed up for our CreditBuilder. 

When you sign up for CreditBuilder, you take the first step in building your score over 1-2 years. Each month you pay $5, which we report to Experian as interest against a loan that is held on your behalf. These successful payments build up your credit history, helping to improve your score. Once the loan term is completed, or if you decide to cancel/stop paying, CreditBuilder is simply marked as paid in full. This prevents any missed payments from undoing the positive impact that your on-time payments have on your credit score.

CreditBuilder is a fantastic stepping stone towards seeing the benefits of an improving credit score, without the responsibility of taking on a big financial commitment. When you do find yourself ready, with the help of a co-signer, Together Loans can help you access funds too! At which point, any CreditBuilder loan you have will be paid in full on your behalf.

The Credit Builder loan account is offered to everyone that applies with us as a Borrower, it is completely optional, allowing you to opt-in, or continue the original loan application without setting up a CreditBuilder Account.
 
How are these payments reported to the Credit Reporting Agencies? Each month you pay $5, which we report to Experian as interest against a loan that is held on your behalf. These successful payments build up your credit history, helping to improve your score. Once the 24 months have passed, or if you decide to cancel/stop paying, CreditBuilder is simply marked as paid in full. This prevents any missed payments from undoing the positive impact that your on-time payments have on your credit score.
 
If you think you don’t need to improve your credit score further and want to cancel this service, please reply to this email with “Cancel CreditBuilder”, and one of our agents will close your account promptly to ensure no extra payments are collected. This will lead to the loan being reported as successfully paid off in your credit file.
 
Please remember that you don’t owe us any money for this Credit Builder Account.
 
We will be happy to help you with any other information or further support.
 
Thanks,
Together Loans

Hi Guetsey, we received a dispute from Experian and sent you an email about your CreditBuilder account which you set up on 06/16/2025 when submitting a loan application with Together Loans. Please check it and if you need help, let us know. Together Loans CreditBuilder Team

interactions.body: (Borrower GT Rule 1 SMS) Hi Lisa, all of our customers must have a cosigner. It's a great sign someone trusts you, so we should too! They can be ANYONE who has a 700+ credit and good history of paying their bills. Homeowners with slightly lower scores will also have a good chance of approval. Remember, if you pay on time, your cosigner will NEVER have to pay! Find tips here: https://transformcredit.com/cosigner-loans. When you do find someone, give them this link https://tcrdt.com/s/OOXKOZQI - we'd love to add you to the 40,000 customers we have already helped like you. If you still can't find a cosigner, please reply CANCEL so I can reserve the loan for someone else. Ben, Transform Credit

interactions.body: Hi Rudy, I want to reassure you that before we ever contact you or attempt to collect any payment from you, we always try Susana's payment methods on file first. However, if those attempts are unsuccessful, we then reach out to you, as agreed in your separate co-signer agreement. To prevent the loan from falling further behind and becoming a larger liability to you. If the loan were to default, the full balance would become due, and our pre-litigation team may get involved to seek a judgment, which is something we genuinely wish to avoid. Best, Amber@TransformCredit
